name: omatic-server-connection
description: Host-aware MCP connection plugin for O-Matic factories with bundled Probot, Fred, and Data skills.

canonical_format.contract: The MCP server is the canonical tool surface for factory DB operations. Bundled SKILL.md files are canonical prompt contracts for host-specific behavior and must not fork per platform.

mcp_hosts.notes: Full operation requires an MCP-capable host that can launch server/index.js over stdio and provide a project .omatic/factory.json or equivalent connection config.

prompt_only_hosts.notes: Prompt-only hosts can load bundled skills as behavior instructions, but cannot perform factory DB operations unless connected through an external MCP bridge or a separate tool adapter.

claude.notes: Claude Code plugin manifest starts the MCP server and loads bundled skills.

codex.notes: Codex plugin manifest loads skills and .mcp.json starts the MCP server.

cowork.notes: Use the same server/index.js with explicit factory_json_path or connection env vars. Cowork does not consume Codex/Claude skill packaging directly.

google.notes: Use a bundled SKILL.md body as the system instruction only for context/planning behavior. No DB tools are available without an MCP bridge.

ollama.notes: Build a Modelfile from a bundled SKILL.md for local prompt behavior. No DB tools are available unless the local app wraps Ollama with MCP/tool calls.

generic.notes: Load the selected SKILL.md as a system/developer instruction. Treat all factory DB actions as unavailable unless the runtime provides matching tools.
